diff --git a/test/testStateMachine.spec.js b/test/testStateMachine.spec.js new file mode 100644 index 0000000..cdee76e --- /dev/null +++ b/test/testStateMachine.spec.js @@ -0,0 +1,219 @@ +import React from 'react' +import { Action, State, testStateMachine, withStatechart } from '../src' + +describe('conditional', () => { + const secondMachine = { + initial: 'a', + states: { + a: { + on: { + SECOND_NEXT: 'b', + }, + onEntry: 'enterBA', + }, + b: { + on: { + SECOND_NEXT: 'a', + }, + onEntry: 'enterBB', + }, + }, + } + + const firstMachine = { + initial: 'a', + states: { + a: { + on: { + FIRST_NEXT: 'b', + }, + onEntry: 'enterA', + }, + b: { + on: { + FIRST_NEXT: 'a', + }, + ...secondMachine, + }, + }, + } + + test('action', () => { + const App = () => ( +
+ a + b.a + b.b +
+ ) + const StateMachine = withStatechart(firstMachine)(App) + + testStateMachine(StateMachine) + }) + + test('state', () => { + const App = () => ( +
+ a + b.a + b.b +
+ ) + const StateMachine = withStatechart(firstMachine)(App) + + testStateMachine(StateMachine) + }) +}) + +test('parallel', () => { + const wordMachine = { + parallel: true, + states: { + bold: { + initial: 'off', + states: { + on: { + on: { TOGGLE_BOLD: 'off' }, + }, + off: { + on: { TOGGLE_BOLD: 'on' }, + }, + }, + }, + underline: { + initial: 'off', + states: { + on: { + on: { TOGGLE_UNDERLINE: 'off' }, + }, + off: { + on: { TOGGLE_UNDERLINE: 'on' }, + }, + }, + }, + italics: { + initial: 'off', + states: { + on: { + on: { TOGGLE_ITALICS: 'off' }, + }, + off: { + on: { TOGGLE_ITALICS: 'on' }, + }, + }, + }, + list: { + initial: 'none', + states: { + none: { + on: { BULLETS: 'bullets', NUMBERS: 'numbers' }, + }, + bullets: { + on: { NONE: 'none', NUMBERS: 'numbers' }, + }, + numbers: { + on: { BULLETS: 'bullets', NONE: 'none' }, + }, + }, + }, + }, + } + + const App = () => ( +
+ bold.on + bold.off + underline.on + underline.off + italics.on + italics.off + list.none + list.bullets + list.numbers +
+ ) + const StateMachine = withStatechart(wordMachine)(App) + + testStateMachine(StateMachine) +}) + +test('channels', () => { + const inner = { + initial: 'inner', + states: { + inner: {}, + }, + } + const Inner = () => ( +
+ + inner + + + outer + +
+ ) + const InnerMachine = withStatechart(inner, { channel: 'inner' })(Inner) + + const outer = { + initial: 'outer', + states: { + outer: {}, + }, + } + const Outer = () => ( +
+ + outer + + +
+ ) + const StateMachine = withStatechart(outer, { channel: 'outer' })(Outer) + + testStateMachine(StateMachine) +}) + +describe('cond', () => { + const statechart = { + initial: 'a', + states: { + a: { + on: { + EVENT: { + b: { + cond: extState => extState.shouldPass, + }, + }, + }, + }, + b: {}, + }, + } + + const Cond = () => ( + + A + B + + ) + const StateMachine = withStatechart(statechart)(Cond) + + test('pass', () => { + const extendedState = { + shouldPass: true, + } + const fixtures = { + a: { + EVENT: extendedState, + }, + } + + testStateMachine(StateMachine, { fixtures, extendedState }) + }) + + test('fail', () => { + testStateMachine(StateMachine) + }) +})
